## Type

- [ ] Product/UI
- [ ] Core/store/actions
- [ ] MCP/integration
- [ ] Ingestion
- [ ] Docs/GitHub
- [ ] Tests/CI

## Verification

- [ ] `pnpm doctor`
- [ ] `pnpm doctor:json`
- [ ] `pnpm first-success`
- [ ] `pnpm first-success:json`
- [ ] `pnpm verify`
- [ ] `pnpm mcp:smoke`
- [ ] `pnpm mcp:codex:smoke`
- [ ] `pnpm test:e2e`
- [ ] Security scan
- [ ] Visual QA screenshots updated when UI changed

## Safety

- [ ] No secrets, private transcripts, or runtime canvas data committed
- [ ] No destructive MCP tools added
- [ ] No external posting, social scraping, payments, or account mutation added
- [ ] Runtime data still defaults outside Git
